productDisplayName: Doodle Girl's Raw Edges Purple Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionPurple round neck top made of 100% cotton, with pink mock lining, short puffed sleeves with ruffles at the elasticated hem, little graphiti below the nape of the neck and shimmer print on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printTransform your little darling into a princess with this top from doodle. The lightly puffed and ruffled sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a tiny skirt and colourful slippers to complete her princess look.
